command:
echo "=== Confirm Remy telegram is silent now (no Conflict, no spam) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since '40 seconds ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'telegram|conflict' | tail -6; echo '--- conflict count:'; journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since '40 seconds ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -c Conflict"

echo ""
echo "=== Investigate the tainted token: what does getMe reveal? ==="
# A bot made via a reseller often has specific bot info
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAEohhXQGCPXJse6u6IKjrcpZiZ_hLyragc/getMe' | python3 -m json.tool"

echo ""
echo "=== Check getUpdates directly - is SOMEONE ELSE polling? (Conflict = yes) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAEohhXQGCPXJse6u6IKjrcpZiZ_hLyragc/getUpdates?timeout=1&offset=-1' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(\"ok:\", d.get(\"ok\"), \"| desc:\", d.get(\"description\",\"none\"))'"
